---
title: "Modules"
---

## Overview

To the left, you can find links to all of the course modules. Click one to get started.

::: callout-tip
See [BruinLearn](bruinlearn.ucla.edu) for the complete course syllabus, including information about course policies, grading, office hours, and more!
:::

## Schedule for Spring 2026

+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Week** | **Date**     | **Module**                                                           | **Description**                                                                                        |
+:========:+:============:+======================================================================+========================================================================================================+
| 1        | March 31,\   | [Intro to Programming with R](modules/01_intro.html)                 | Installation and familiarization with R and RStudio interface;\                                        |
|          | April 2      |                                                                      | Data organization, reproducible scientific programming                                                 |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 2        | April 7, 9   | [Programming Foundations](modules/02_programming-foundations-1.html) | Variables, vectors, branches, functions                                                                |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 3        | April 14, 16 | [Data Visualization](modules/04_data-visualization.html)             | Exploratory data visualization with ggplot, customizing plots                                          |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 4        | April 21, 21 | [Data Summaries](modules/06_data-summaries.html)                     | Importing and summarizing data, tidyverse pipes                                                        |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 5        | April 28, 30 | [Data Wrangling](modules/07_data-wrangling.html)                     | Selecting and filtering data, creating new variables                                                   |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 6        | May 5, 7     | [Data Tidying](modules/09_data-tidying.html)                         | What is "tidy" data and how do we get it; Combining datasets                                           |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 7        | May 12, 14   | [Statistical Analysis in R](modules/10_statistical-analysis.html)    | Basic statistical analysis in R, including t-tests, ANOVAs, and regression analyses on sample datasets |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 8        | May 19, 21   | Data Workshop                                                        | Integrating these steps;\                                                                              |
|          |              |                                                                      | Maybe: Working with fMRI data in R                                                                     |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 9        | May 26, 28   | [Intro to Machine Learning](modules/11_machine-learning.html)        | Simple machine learning models for classifying psychological outcomes                                  |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| 10       | June 2, 4    | Project Presentations                                                | [**Final projects** **due**](projects/final-project.html)                                              |
+----------+--------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
